name: claude-code-hooks
description: Production-ready Claude Code hooks, each installable on its own as a plugin.

plugins.name: context-hogs
plugins.description: Per-file context-cost leaderboard — attributes every tool result's tokens to the files it loaded, so you know which files cost you the most.

plugins.name: nerf-receipts
plugins.description: A personal flight recorder for Claude Code quality — records your own per-session failure rate, edit churn, and tokens/task by model version, and flags real shifts when a model changes.

plugins.name: dead-rules-audit
plugins.description: CLAUDE.md compliance scorecard — tallies which rules Claude actually follows vs ignores as you edit, and flags chronically-ignored rules to promote into a deterministic hook.

plugins.name: pr-provenance-stamp
plugins.description: Stamps a provenance receipt — prompts, estimated spend, tests run with exit codes, and a truthful agent-authored line split — into your PR body on `gh pr create`.

plugins.name: standup-autopilot
plugins.description: Writes your daily standup from what your agents actually did across repos — captures tasks, tests, PRs, and blockers from session transcripts and re-injects yesterday's open blockers next session.

plugins.name: dead-end-registry
plugins.description: Remembers approaches you tried and reverted (with reason and estimated token cost) and warns before you retry them — via a prompt-submit card and an ask-before-edit guard.
